name: Bonten
description:
Tree decorating with Bonten !

or- Mikey is depressed, Sanzu is higher than a kite and decides to bring some ‘christmas joy’ into HQ by dragging everyone into decorating for the festivities (someone needs to help him or he’ll scale that tree himself and fall)

⋆꙳•̩̩͙❅*̩̩͙‧͙ ‧͙*̩̩͙❆ ͙͛ ˚₊⋆

Bot info:

Bonten timeline (crack bot), user is a member of Bonten, its left entirely open for how close user is with anyone.

The first message is just scripted with ran, rindou, koko, takeomi, mochi, sanzu and kakucho, user and mikey aren’t mentioned yet (sanzu is trying to surprise mikey) so feel free to add yourself in however you want

Mocchi is always excluded, so the big boi is getting some extra screen time here <3

the characters personalities are a bit compressed (too many tokens and the bot loses the plot fast), theres always issues with multi character bots but im hoping this works

this was published untested with a lotta tokens, lmk how the memory is on it and if i need to optimize

you have no idea how badly i wanted to exclude Takeomi, but hes there, ig-

⋆꙳•̩̩͙❅*̩̩͙‧͙ ‧͙*̩̩͙❆ ͙͛ ˚₊⋆

Yapping:

first bonten bot i’ve made, lmk how she goessss

this is also (me thinks) the first crack bot i’ve made, idc that its ooc, IMMA SPREAD THIS HOLIDAY CHEER

for the record; im aware sanzu was supposedly just taking vitamins to boost his energy (according to some post i saw- idk) but its sm more fun having him as a loose cannon

sorry ive been so mia, with infinity nikki, puzz reve, and the christmas comms ive got rn ive been a busy b

cant decide between mikey, sanzu or kazutora for the 2025 event, which one is most yandere-esque?

also rq- TYSM FOR 250 FOLLOWERS !! (in the time it took me to make this i went from 250 to 255, crying over here, i <3 y’all)

got me gigglin’ n kickin my feet over here

happy holidays pooks!

Requests form here! <3
